rationale: Fresh validator started from the TASK-081 implementation build, roadmap task, file-structure/audits specs, and touched source/tests. Acceptance verified: drift fixture intentionally fails audit profiles for forbidden source folders, stale refs, script-owned semantics, generated task-view mismatches, package reachability, missing lockfile, and unreachable Pi extension; package audit checks manifest reachability, lockfile presence, and npm pack dry-run contents; generated task views are compared to roadmap queue truth; scripts/check-architecture.mjs is only a wrapper over executeCodewikiAudit; current repo audits and requested checks pass. Dirty pre-commit worktree is acceptable for implementation validation with working_tree_digest; task-close/publication still need clean immutable proof.
